title: OTel Service Dashboard
description: Single-service deep dive: RED metrics and slowest operations broken out by SpanKind (Server, Client, Internal, Async), with errors and recent logs side by side. Click a service in Traces Explorer to land here.

list.name: Deployments (service.version)
list.rawQuery:
SELECT
  time,
  ServiceName AS tags,
  concat(ServiceName, ' deployed ', version, if(prev_version != '', concat(' (was ', prev_version, ')'), '')) AS text,
  'Deployment' AS title
FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL 30 second) AS time,
    ServiceName,
    any(ResourceAttributes['service.version']) AS version,
    lagInFrame(any(ResourceAttributes['service.version']))
      OVER (PARTITION BY ServiceName ORDER BY time) AS prev_version
  FROM otel_traces
  WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
    AND ResourceAttributes['service.version'] != ''
  GROUP BY ServiceName, time
  ORDER BY ServiceName, time
)
WHERE prev_version != '' AND prev_version != version
ORDER BY time

target.rawSql:
SELECT
  time,
  ServiceName AS tags,
  concat(ServiceName, ' deployed ', version, if(prev_version != '', concat(' (was ', prev_version, ')'), '')) AS text,
  'Deployment' AS title
FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL 30 second) AS time,
    ServiceName,
    any(ResourceAttributes['service.version']) AS version,
    lagInFrame(any(ResourceAttributes['service.version']))
      OVER (PARTITION BY ServiceName ORDER BY time) AS prev_version
  FROM otel_traces
  WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp)
    AND ResourceAttributes['service.version'] != ''
  GROUP BY ServiceName, time
  ORDER BY ServiceName, time
)
WHERE prev_version != '' AND prev_version != version
ORDER BY time

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT ServiceName FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) ORDER BY ServiceName
list.label: Service
list.name: service

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ServiceName FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) ORDER BY ServiceName

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT SpanName FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' ORDER BY SpanName
list.label: Operation
list.name: operation

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT SpanName FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' ORDER BY SpanName

panels.description: Server spans per second for ${service}: incoming requests this service handles. The R in RED.
panels.title: Request Rate (Server)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) AS time, count() / $__interval_s AS rps FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND SpanKind = 'Server' AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.description: Fraction of Server spans for ${service} with StatusCode = 'Error'. The E in RED.
panels.title: Error Rate (Server)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) AS time, countIf(StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) / count() AS error_rate FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND SpanKind = 'Server' AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.description: P50, P90 (solid) and P99 (dashed orange) Server span duration for ${service}. The D in RED.
panels.title: Duration Percentiles (Server)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) AS time, quantile(0.5)(Duration) AS p50, quantile(0.9)(Duration) AS p90, quantile(0.99)(Duration) AS p99 FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND SpanKind = 'Server' AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.description: Server operations for ${service} ranked by P99 duration. Click an operation to open the matching trace search in Traces Explorer.
panels.title: Slowest Server Operations

targets.rawSql: SELECT SpanName AS Operation, count() AS Count, quantile(0.5)(Duration) AS P50, quantile(0.99)(Duration) AS P99 FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND SpanKind = 'Server' AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation) GROUP BY SpanName ORDER BY P99 DESC LIMIT 20

panels.description: Client spans per second for ${service}: outgoing requests this service makes to its dependencies. The R in RED.
panels.title: Request Rate (Client)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) AS time, count() / $__interval_s AS rps FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND SpanKind = 'Client' AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.description: Fraction of Client spans for ${service} with StatusCode = 'Error'. The E in RED.
panels.title: Error Rate (Client)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) AS time, countIf(StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) / count() AS error_rate FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND SpanKind = 'Client' AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.description: P50, P90 (solid) and P99 (dashed orange) Client span duration for ${service}. The D in RED.
panels.title: Duration Percentiles (Client)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) AS time, quantile(0.5)(Duration) AS p50, quantile(0.9)(Duration) AS p90, quantile(0.99)(Duration) AS p99 FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND SpanKind = 'Client' AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.description: Client operations for ${service} ranked by P99 duration. Use these to spot slow dependencies. Click an operation to open the matching trace search in Traces Explorer.
panels.title: Slowest Client Operations

targets.rawSql: SELECT SpanName AS Operation, count() AS Count, quantile(0.5)(Duration) AS P50, quantile(0.99)(Duration) AS P99 FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND SpanKind = 'Client' AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation) GROUP BY SpanName ORDER BY P99 DESC LIMIT 20

panels.description: Operations with errors for ${service}, ranked by error count, with the SpanKind that produced them. Click an operation to open the matching trace search in Traces Explorer.
panels.title: Top Errors

targets.rawSql: SELECT SpanName AS Operation, SpanKind AS Kind, StatusMessage AS Error, count() AS Count, max(Timestamp) AS "Last Seen" FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR') GROUP BY SpanName, SpanKind, StatusMessage ORDER BY Count DESC LIMIT 20

panels.description: Recent logs for ${service}. Click a row to expand attributes.
panels.title: Logs for ${service}

targets.rawSql: SELECT Timestamp AS timestamp, Body AS body, SeverityText AS level, ServiceName, TraceId, SpanId FROM otel_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 200

panels.description: Internal spans per second for ${service}: in-process work (function-level instrumentation, no network).
panels.title: Request Rate (Internal)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) AS time, count() / $__interval_s AS rps FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND SpanKind = 'Internal' AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.description: Fraction of Internal spans for ${service} with StatusCode = 'Error'.
panels.title: Error Rate (Internal)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) AS time, countIf(StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) / count() AS error_rate FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND SpanKind = 'Internal' AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.description: P50, P90 (solid) and P99 (dashed orange) Internal span duration for ${service}.
panels.title: Duration Percentiles (Internal)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) AS time, quantile(0.5)(Duration) AS p50, quantile(0.9)(Duration) AS p90, quantile(0.99)(Duration) AS p99 FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND SpanKind = 'Internal' AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.description: Internal operations for ${service} ranked by P99 duration. Click an operation to open the matching trace search in Traces Explorer.
panels.title: Slowest Internal Operations

targets.rawSql: SELECT SpanName AS Operation, count() AS Count, quantile(0.5)(Duration) AS P50, quantile(0.99)(Duration) AS P99 FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND SpanKind = 'Internal' AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation) GROUP BY SpanName ORDER BY P99 DESC LIMIT 20

panels.description: Async spans (Producer + Consumer) per second for ${service}: message production and consumption against queues / event buses.
panels.title: Message Rate (Async)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) AS time, count() / $__interval_s AS rps FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND SpanKind IN ('Producer', 'Consumer') AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.description: Fraction of Async (Producer + Consumer) spans for ${service} with StatusCode = 'Error'.
panels.title: Error Rate (Async)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) AS time, countIf(StatusCode IN ('Error', 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR')) / count() AS error_rate FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND SpanKind IN ('Producer', 'Consumer') AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.description: P50, P90 (solid) and P99 (dashed orange) Async span duration for ${service}.
panels.title: Duration Percentiles (Async)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) AS time, quantile(0.5)(Duration) AS p50, quantile(0.9)(Duration) AS p90, quantile(0.99)(Duration) AS p99 FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND SpanKind IN ('Producer', 'Consumer') AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.description: Async (Producer + Consumer) operations for ${service} ranked by P99 duration. The Kind column tells you whether each row is a Producer or a Consumer.
panels.title: Slowest Async Operations

targets.rawSql: SELECT SpanName AS Operation, SpanKind AS Kind, count() AS Count, quantile(0.5)(Duration) AS P50, quantile(0.99)(Duration) AS P99 FROM otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = '${service}' AND SpanKind IN ('Producer', 'Consumer') AND $__conditionalAll(SpanName IN ($operation), $operation) GROUP BY SpanName, SpanKind ORDER BY P99 DESC LIMIT 20
